---
title: "Modernization Technical Specifications"
subtitle: "Cross-adapter specs organized by technology domain"
doc-type: landing
canon-source: "src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml"
derived-from: "uiao canon"
aspirational: true
---

::: {.callout-important title="Content pending"}
This section is part of the customer-documents skeleton but has not yet been
authored. The domain slugs below are reserved; content will land in line
with the [Customer Documents Roadmap](../ROADMAP.qmd). For per-adapter
material that is canon-derived and already available, see
[Adapter Technical Specifications](../adapter-technical-specifications/index.qmd).
:::

Where *Adapter Technical Specifications* cover one vendor system per
document, the Modernization Technical Specifications are higher-level
cross-adapter specs organized by technology domain. They describe how
multiple adapters cooperate to deliver a domain capability.

## Planned domains

| Slug | Domain | Canon anchor |
|---|---|---|
| `cloud/mts-cloud.md` | Cloud modernization (GCC-Moderate boundary) | `docs/docs/authorization-boundary.qmd` |
| `identity/mts-identity.md` | Identity modernization (Entra ID, OrgTree) | `docs/docs/identity_plane_deep_dive_v1.0.qmd` |
| `sase/mts-sase.md` | SASE / secure edge convergence | `src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml` |
| `sdwan/mts-sdwan.md` | SD-WAN underlay modernization | `src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml` |
| `telemetry/mts-telemetry.md` | Telemetry plane and correlation | `docs/docs/telemetry_plane_deep_dive_v1.0.qmd` |
| `zero-trust/mts-zero-trust.md` | Zero-trust enforcement layering | `src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-008-zero-trust-identity.md` |
| `_template/mts-generic-template.md` | Generic MTS authoring template | — |
